focalElement: three-headed TotK aurogax dragon — gloom-corrupted body shot through with pale-cyan ancient-arrow cracks, three heads (gloom / Umbra-ancient-tech / Auren-sacred-machinery) rising on three long necks
secondaryElement: concentric corruption-bloom background woven with faint Auren spiral sigils and Umbra eye-sigils in stained glass
notes: Colosseum mode (4hr1) — inaugural near-end-tier super-boss; flavor name 'Trinity Aurogax'
Body matches hollow-effigy aesthetic (blackened-purple + magenta gloom-veins) plus pale-cyan ancient-arrow cracks
Three heads carry three eras of Elysian power: Demon-King (gloom), Umbra (ancient tech), Auren (sacred machinery)
